hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE '\.(rs|toml)$'; then ~/.cargo/bin/cargo fmt --quiet; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if echo "$f" | grep -qE 'crates/banglakit-(core|docx|pptx)/.*\.rs$'; then ~/.cargo/bin/cargo build --release -p banglakit-cli 2>/dev/null && (target/release/banglakit-converter -i examples/test.docx -o /tmp/verify_output.docx 2>/dev/null; true) && /Applications/LibreOffice.app/Contents/MacOS/soffice --headless --convert-to pdf --outdir /tmp /tmp/verify_output.docx 2>/dev/null; fi; } 2>/dev/null || true
